title: España y Canadá firman una alianza tecnológica en Inteligencia Artificial
summary: El viaje oficial del Rey y Cuerpo al país norteamericano, en compañía del presidente de CEOE, impulsa alianzas en materia de inversión, digitalización, e infraestructuras. El acuerdo estatal propicia pactos empresariales entre Indra, Multiverse, Cohere y Coveo. Leer

title: La UE sella definitivamente el polémico acuerdo arancelario firmado con EEUU
summary: El Parlamento Europeo y el Consejo de la UE aprueban activar la rebaja al 0% en los gravámenes comunitarios pactada hace diez meses aunque introduce salvaguardas frente a la volatilidad de Trump. Leer

title: La caída en desgracia del líder espiritual
summary: El expresidente José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero no tiene ningún cargo orgánico en el PSOE, pero es evidente que es el líder espiritual de la formación que hoy comanda Sánchez. Leer

title: Las exportaciones españolas repuntan un 5,1% en marzo y sostienen el primer trimestre
summary: El aumento de las ventas registrado en el tercer mes del año explica un crecimiento del 0,7% en el primer trimestre. Las exportaciones a China y EEUU volvieron a crecer en marzo. Leer

title: Atlantic Corridor: Will Spain's forgotten regions finally get high-speed rail?
summary: Spain's government has set itself the goal of getting high-speed rail to numerous regions which have long been waiting for AVE trains to reach them, connecting them to other parts of Europe through a rail expansion called the Atlantic Corridor.

title: 'Four to six months': Why waiting times for Spain's driving tests are so long
summary: With average waiting lists of up to six months in some regions, driving school groups and Spain's traffic authority are pointing to different reasons (and each other) to explainer why learner drivers and hauliers must wait so long to take their practical test.

title: How Spain is gearing up for August's total solar eclipse
summary: Aside from Spain, the next total solar eclipse will also be visible in Greenland, Iceland, Russia and a small portion of Portugal, with a partial eclipse in other parts of Europe and western Africa.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Thursday
summary: Spain increases age window for breast cancer screening, Spanish director Almodóvar calls Trump, Netanyahu and Putin 'monsters', Rafa Nadal to launch Netflix documentary series and more news on Thursday May 21st.

title: Do I have to give up my US citizenship if I become Spanish?
summary: If you're an American who's eligible for Spanish citizenship, you may be considering what this will mean for your US citizenship. Can you keep it? Should you renounce US citizenship? And is Donald Trump planning to change citizenship laws in some way?

title: Mango heir released on bail after arrest over father's fatal cliff fall
summary: The eldest son of Spanish clothing empire Mango's founder Isak Andic was released on Tuesday after posting one million euros' bail following his arrest in a murder inquiry into his father's 2024 death.

title: Spain's PM gives 'full support' to predecessor targeted in corruption probe
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez on Wednesday expressed "full support" for his predecessor José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero after a court placed his Socialist ally under investigation for alleged influence peddling.
